risk_rationale: The Digital ID Act 2024 introduces new standards for biometric information handling, which may impact TikTok's data sovereignty and localization policies, particularly in relation to data residency and cross-border data transfers involving biometric data.

compliance_gaps.gap_description: The new regulation requires specific standards for biometric information that may not be covered under current cross-border data transfer mechanisms.
The regulation may necessitate changes in access control architecture to comply with new digital identity system standards.

remediations.title: Biometric Data Compliance Enhancement
remediations.description: Implement additional controls and standards for handling biometric data to comply with the Digital ID Act 2024.
acceptance_criteria: Biometric data handling standards are documented and implemented
Compliance with new AU standards for biometric data is verified

business_impact: The regulation may require updates to data handling processes, potentially increasing operational costs and necessitating changes in data infrastructure.
recommended_actions: Conduct a detailed compliance assessment of biometric data handling processes
Engage with Australian regulators to clarify compliance expectations
Update internal policies and training to align with new biometric data standards
